name: clarity-guardian
description: Task clarity guardian bot for GitHub Issues and Pull Requests.

scripts.build:smoke: rm -rf .smoke-dist && tsc --module commonjs --target ES2022 --moduleResolution node --types node --esModuleInterop --outDir .smoke-dist scripts/smoke-test.ts
scripts.smoke: npm run build --silent && npm run build:smoke --silent && node .smoke-dist/smoke-test.js
scripts.check:smoke: tsc --noEmit --strict --module commonjs --target ES2022 --moduleResolution node --types node --esModuleInterop scripts/smoke-test.ts
